entities.name: Pure Talent Profile
entities.context: Candidate profile collected independently of job applications, removing the 'angling' incentive for more honest, universally applicable data

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company focused on hiring and talent matching

entities.name: Neutral Talent Database
entities.context: Job-agnostic talent database that enables superior matching due to uncorrupted underlying data

entities.name: Incentive-Driven Data Distortion
entities.context: Principle that when specific rewards are tied to data points, subjects optimize for rewards rather than accuracy

entities.name: Observation Pressure Principle
entities.context: Principle that observation under pressure distorts the subject; removing pressure restores signal purity

relationships.context: Careerspan should leverage Pure Talent profiles for better matching
Careerspan should prioritize building neutral talent databases over job-specific ones
Pure Talent profiles are the foundation of neutral talent databases
The pressure principle explains why decoupling data collection from applications yields higher fidelity profiles
Both principles address how external pressures corrupt data integrity
